Read .ai-map/ directory before writing any code.
Start with .ai-map/README.md for project overview.
See .ai-map/SOP.md for coding patterns.
See .ai-map/ARCHITECTURE.md for system design.
After ANY file changes, update relevant .ai-map/ files.
NEVER full-scan the codebase if .ai-map/ has what you need.
NEVER read node_modules/, .next/, dist/, build/.
